headline: A Look At West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Stock performance snapshot and business context West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock last closing at $322.01 and showing double digit total returns over the past year. For readers tracking consistency, the stock shows positive total returns over the past week, month and past 3 months, alongside a reported 1 year total return of 50.448% and a 3 year total return of a 9.823% decline. Over 5 years, total return is described...
